title: Adobe Experience Cloud Segment
description: An audience segment definition used across Adobe Experience Cloud products to target groups of profiles based on shared attributes, behaviors, or engagement patterns.

segmentId.description: The unique identifier for the segment.

name.description: The human-readable name of the segment.

description.description: A detailed description of what the segment represents.

format.description: The format of the expression value.

value.description: The PQL expression defining the segment criteria.

evaluationType.description: How the segment is evaluated against profiles.

mergePolicyId.description: The merge policy used when evaluating this segment.

schema.description: The XDM schema this segment is based on.

status.description: The current status of the segment.

profileCount.description: The estimated number of profiles in this segment.

owner.description: The user who created the segment.

tags.description: Tags for organizing and categorizing segments.

lastModified.description: When the segment was last modified.

lastEvaluated.description: When the segment was last evaluated.
